steps.title: Solve the equation
steps.content: Isolate the absolute value: $|8-x|=72$. So $8-x=72$ or $8-x=-72$, giving $x=-64$ or $x=80$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches 16. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so D is correct.
